dismissalText.long: c Rashid Khan b Mohammed Siraj
dismissalText.commentary: Jacob Bethell c Rashid Khan b Mohammed Siraj 5 (5b 1x4 0x6 13m) SR: 100

dismissalComment.html: chipped straight to mid wicket, and Siraj breaks through! Fullish on the pads and this is there to be hit. Bethell looks to clip it away but cannot keep it down. Does not get under it either and he could not have picked out Rashid better. Some respite for GT, even if it is not of the man who has caused havoc so far, but they will take it nonetheless!

dismissalText.commentary: Virat Kohli c Rashid Khan b Rabada 28 (13b 5x4 1x6 17m) SR: 215.38

dismissalComment.html: clothed up, and Rabada has his revenge! Kudos to the bowler for coming back strong, but also to the captain for persisting with him. This is banged in short, following the batter outside leg. Kohli, stepping out to swipe at it, gets cramped for room. The ball spews up off the splice and Rashid, moving to his right from mid wicket, slides and completes the catch. GT go back-to-back!

dismissalText.commentary: Devdutt Padikkal b Rashid Khan 40 (24b 5x4 2x6 58m) SR: 166.66

dismissalComment.html: chopped on, and Rashid strikes again! Slipped through on a back of a length on middle and leg. Seems like the slider and it skids through. Padikkal wants to cut it off his stumps but the lack of room means he chops it onto his pad, before the ball bobbles onto the stumps. RCB seven down, and in a heap of trouble now!

dismissalText.commentary: Rajat Patidar c Holder b Arshad Khan 19 (15b 2x4 1x6 22m) SR: 126.66

dismissalComment.html: goes straight up, and Holder has somehow managed to hold on! Banged into the track on middle and leg, and this seems to stick in the surface. Patidar looks for the pick-up pull but top-edges it. Holder runs around to his right from deep square and despite the presence of Rabada, who was running back from short fine, Holder lunges to his right and makes it stick in his mitts. Arshad has a wicket, and Patidar has to go. But hang on. The replays have come up on the screen, and Kohli is very animated with the fourth umpire beyond the ropes. And Kohli continues to moan. Looks like Patidar's dismissal has been confirmed, and RCB are not at all happy!

dismissalText.commentary: Tim David c Holder b Rashid Khan 9 (6b 0x4 1x6 6m) SR: 150

dismissalComment.html: sharp grab by Holder, and Rashid is into the act again! Googly fizzed in full on off. David gets down on one knee and looks to mow it over cow corner. Shanks it off the inside half of the bat and the ball flies towards Holder at short mid wicket, who leaps into the air and clasps his palms around it. No problem with this catch, and RCB are now five down!

dismissalText.commentary: Krunal Pandya c Holder b Arshad Khan 4 (4b 1x4 0x6 4m) SR: 100

dismissalComment.html: another tame chip to mid wicket, and Holder is like a catching magnet tonight! He would catch a cold in the desert! Back of a length on middle and leg. A bit of hold in the surface and Krunal, like many before him, cannot keep his flick down. Pops it straight to Holder, and Arshad is over the moon. RCB six down, and under the pump!

dismissalComment.html: oh dear - what have you done, Romario Shepherd?! Hard length outside off and under ordinary circumstances, this was there to be hit. But perhaps not at 126-7. Shepherd, though, gives in to the temptation and shanks it terribly. Straight to Sudharsan, and GT continue to pile misery on RCB!

dismissalText.long: c Sai Sudharsan b Arshad Khan
dismissalText.commentary: Venkatesh Iyer c Sai Sudharsan b Arshad Khan 12 (15b 1x4 0x6 28m) SR: 80

dismissalComment.html: heaved to deep mid wicket, and Sudharsan lunges forward to take it! Slot ball outside off and Iyer gives it all he has. The ball pings off the inner half of the bat, though, and arrows towards Sudharsan. He dives forward and then rolls to retain control of the ball. The third umpire does check if the catch is clean and he says it is. Iyer has to depart!

dismissalText.commentary: Josh Hazlewood run out (†Buttler/Shubman Gill) 0 (1b 0x4 0x6 1m) SR: 0

dismissalComment.html: has Hazlewood been run out at the batter's end?! Well, that might be immaterial because he has been run out at the other end! Back of a length on leg. Hazlewood stays leg side of the ball and pokes at it. Gets beaten on the outside. Hazlewood wanders out of his ground and then has to try and stretch back, with Buttler hitting the stumps. Once that happens, Bhuvneshwar decides to pinch a run and Hazlewood has to then hurtle to the other end. The ball, having hit the stumps, rolls around on the pitch and Gill is first to react. He picks it up and throws down the stumps at the bowler's end, with Hazlewood just about in the frame. RCB bowled out for 155!

dismissalComment.html: goes straight up, and Holder has somehow managed to hold on! Banged into the track on middle and leg, and this seems to stick in the surface. Looks like Patidar's dismissal has been confirmed, and RCB are not at all happy!

dismissalText.commentary: Venkatesh Iyer c Sai Sudharsan b Arshad Khan 12 (15b 1x4 0x6 28m) SR: 80

dismissalComment.html: heaved to deep mid wicket, and Sudharsan lunges forward to take it! Slot ball outside off and Iyer gives it all he has. The ball pings off the inner half of the bat, though, and arrows towards Sudharsan. He dives forward and then rolls to retain control of the ball. The third umpire does check if the catch is clean and he says it is. Iyer has to depart!

dismissalText.commentary: Josh Hazlewood run out (†Buttler/Shubman Gill) 0 (1b 0x4 0x6 1m) SR: 0

dismissalComment.html: has Hazlewood been run out at the batter's end?! Well, that might be immaterial because he has been run out at the other end! Back of a length on leg. Hazlewood stays leg side of the ball and pokes at it. Gets beaten on the outside. Hazlewood wanders out of his ground and then has to try and stretch back, with Buttler hitting the stumps. Once that happens, Bhuvneshwar decides to pinch a run and Hazlewood has to then hurtle to the other end. The ball, having hit the stumps, rolls around on the pitch and Gill is first to react. He picks it up and throws down the stumps at the bowler's end, with Hazlewood just about in the frame. RCB bowled out for 155!

dismissalText.commentary: Washington Sundar lbw b Shepherd 12 (12b 0x4 1x6 32m) SR: 100

dismissalComment.html: RCB plead and plead and plead, but the umpire says no! RCB review! Back of a length on middle and off, and this skids through. Sundar is late on the stroke and gets pinged on the back leg. Might be a little high, but Sundar could still be in trouble if he has not hit it. No bat involved. Ball Tracking comes up and...it shows the ball to be crashing into off stump. Shepherd turning it around, and GT are crumbling!

dismissalText.commentary: Jason Holder c Padikkal b Suyash Sharma 12 (10b 0x4 1x6 19m) SR: 120

dismissalComment.html: dragged to deep mid wicket, and is there life in this game still?! Suyash dangles the carrot on a full length on middle. Holder picks the googly and slogs at it. Reaches out a little too much in front, though, and drags it straight down Padikkal's throat. GT six down now!
